Name: SNOMEDCTBodyStructures
Title: SNOMED CT Body Structures
Descriptino: This value set includes all codes from [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) where concept is-a 442083009 (Anatomical or acquired body site (body structure)).

Name: DeviceType
Title: Device Type
Descriptino: Codes used to identify medical devices. Includes concepts from SNOMED CT (http://www.snomed.org/) where concept is-a 49062001 (Device)  and is provided as a suggestive example.

Name: DiagnosticServiceSectionCodes
Title: Diagnostic Service Section Codes
Descriptino: This value set includes all the codes in HL7 V2 table 0074.

Name: Diet
Title: Diet
Descriptino: This value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate dietary preferences or restrictions a patient may have.

Name: DischargeDisposition
Title: Discharge disposition
Descriptino: This value set defines a set of codes that can be used to where the patient left the hospital.

Name: LocationType
Title: Location type
Descriptino: This example value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate the physical form of the Location.

Name: MedicationAdministration Category Codes
Title: Medication administration  category  codes
Descriptino: MedicationAdministration Category Codes

Name: SNOMEDCTFormCodes
Title: SNOMED CT Form Codes
Descriptino: This value set includes all dose form codes from SNOMED CT - provided as an exemplar.

Name: medicationRequest Category Codes
Title: Medication request  category  codes
Descriptino: MedicationRequest Category Codes

Name: medicationRequest Status Reason Codes
Title: Medication request  status  reason  codes
Descriptino: MedicationRequest Status Reason Codes

Name: LOINCCodes
Title: LOINC Codes
Descriptino: This value set includes all LOINC codes

Name: ObservationMethods
Title: Observation Methods
Descriptino: Observation Method codes from [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) where concept is-a 272394005 (Technique (qualifier value)) or is-a 129264002 (Action (qualifier value)) or is-a 386053000 (Evaluation procedure(procedure))

Name: VitalSigns
Title: Vital Signs
Descriptino: This value set indicates the allowed vital sign result types.   The LOINC code for Vitals Signs panel (85353-1) is a grouping structure for a set of vital signs and includes related links (with type=has-member) to the Observations in this set (e.g. respiratory rate, heart rate, BP).  The Blood pressure panel (85354-9) is used to group the component observations Systolic blood pressure (8480-6) and Diastolic blood pressure (8462-4).

Name: ProcedureCodes(SNOMEDCT)
Title: Procedure Codes (SNOMED CT)
Descriptino: Procedure Code: All SNOMED CT procedure codes.

Name: ProcedureReasonCodes
Title: Procedure Reason Codes
Descriptino: This example value set defines the set of codes that can be used to indicate a reason for a procedure.

Name: SNOMEDCTReasonMedicationNotGivenCodes
Title: SNOMED CT Reason Medication Not Given Codes
Descriptino: This value set includes all medication refused, medication not administered, and non-administration of necessary drug or medicine codes from SNOMED CT - provided as an exemplar value set.

Name: LOINCDiagnosticReportCodes
Title: LOINC Diagnostic Report Codes
Descriptino: This value set includes LOINC codes that relate to Diagnostic Observations.

Name: SNOMEDCTRouteCodes
Title: SNOMED CT Route Codes
Descriptino: This value set includes all Route codes from SNOMED CT - provided as an exemplar.

Name: ServiceRequestCategoryCodes
Title: Service Request Category Codes
Descriptino: An example value set of SNOMED CT concepts that can classify a requested service

Name: USCoreDiagnosticReportCategory
Title: US Core DiagnosticReport Category
Descriptino: The US Core Diagnostic Report Category Value Set is a 'starter set' of categories supported for fetching and Diagnostic Reports and notes.

Name: USCoreMedicationCodes
Title: US Core Medication Codes (RxNorm)
Descriptino: All prescribable medication formulations represented using  either a 'generic' or 'brand-specific' concept. This includes RxNorm codes whose Term Type is SCD (semantic clinical drug), SBD (semantic brand drug), GPCK (generic pack), BPCK (brand pack), SCDG (semantic clinical drug group), SBDG (semantic brand drug group), SCDF (semantic clinical drug form), or SBDF (semantic brand drug form)

Name: Hl7VSReAdmissionIndicator
Title: hl7VS-re-admissionIndicator
Descriptino: Value Set of codes which are used to specify that a patient is being re-admitted to a healthcare facility from which they were discharged, and indicates the circumstances around such re-admission.

Name: ServiceDeliveryLocationRoleType
Title: ServiceDeliveryLocationRoleType
Descriptino: A role of a place that further classifies the setting (e.g., accident site, road side, work site, community location) in which services are delivered.

Name: AcuteCareHospitalDailyEventDiagnosticReportStatus
Title: ACH Daily Diagnostic Report Status ValueSet
Descriptino: A set of codes indicating the status of the diagnostic report.

Name: AcuteCareHospitalDailyEventEncounterClass
Title: ACH Daily Encounter Class ValueSet
Descriptino: A set of codes indicating the encounter class that represent inpatient, observation and short stay concepts.

Name: AcuteCareHospitalDailyEncounterStatus
Title: ACH Daily Encounter Status ValueSet
Descriptino: A set of codes indicating the status of the encounter.

Name: AcuteCareHospitalMonthlyEncounterClass
Title: ACH Monthly Encounter Class ValueSet
Descriptino: A set of codes indicating the encounter class that represent inpatient, emergency, observation and short stay concepts.

Name: AcuteCareHospitalMonthlyEncounterStatus
Title: ACH Monthly Encounter Status ValueSet
Descriptino: A set of codes indicating the status of the encounter.
